status: endpoint LIVE + verified — build the branded form against this contract
summary: Replace the Microsoft Forms CTA on guidedailabs.com with a custom, on-brand intake form. Your BACKEND posts the submission server-side to the live Power Automate endpoint (URL + secret injected at release); it creates a CRM record with full parity to the current Forms path. Keep the existing Forms CTA live as fallback until we jointly e2e the new form.

endpoint.secretHandling: CAPABILITY SECRET. Store the URL + x-intake-secret as SERVER-SIDE env vars/secrets only. NEVER ship them in client/browser code. The browser form posts to YOUR backend route; the backend adds the header and forwards to this URL. Rotation: ask the Windows side and we re-mint.
endpoint.response: HTTP 202 Accepted (fire-and-forget; the flow validates + creates asynchronously). Treat 202 as accepted. No synchronous per-field error; the guard silently drops invalid/bot submissions by design.

payloadContract.source: "Guided AI Labs"  (REQUIRED, exact string — drives IntakeSource; any other value is rejected by the guard)
payloadContract.needSummary: string (REQUIRED, non-empty) -> NeedSummary (+ used in Title)
payloadContract.situation: one of the 4 EXACT strings in situationChoices, or "" if skipped -> IntentPath column
payloadContract.consent: boolean true -> recorded as "Consent: I agree"
payloadContract.company: HONEYPOT — hidden field, must be empty. Bots that fill it are silently dropped.

situationChoices: Just me — I want to grow my own AI skills
My team — I want to build team capability
My organization — we need a broader AI strategy
Governance or policy — we need frameworks and oversight

formRequirements.fieldsAndOrder: Match the current Microsoft Form field set + order so the CRM record shape is unchanged: Full name, Email, Organization, What are you looking for (= needSummary), What best describes your situation? (= situation, the 4 choices), How did you hear about us, consent checkbox. Plus the hidden honeypot (company).
formRequirements.antiSpam: Secret (server-side) + honeypot only — no CAPTCHA (Adam decision). The honeypot field MUST be present, visually hidden, and validated empty.
formRequirements.design: Match the guidedailabs.com landing page — your call on fonts/layout/colour; you own the brand. Full creative control (the whole point of leaving Microsoft Forms).
formRequirements.ux: On submit: on-brand thank-you state; on network error, a friendly retry. Endpoint is fire-and-forget (202), so optimistically confirm success once the backend gets 202.

parityProof.verified: 2026-06-23 — server-side e2e BOTH brands: POST -> CRM item with correct IntakeSource, IntentPath, SignalType=Website, SignalStatus=New, provenance footer (Intake: custom site form). Guard negatives (bad secret / filled honeypot / invalid source) all blocked. 0 residue.
parityProof.note: The current Microsoft Forms path stays LIVE in parallel. Do NOT remove the existing CTA until we jointly verify the new form from a real browser.

_staging.status: STAGED — Adam controls release timing (website under active work). On release, the Windows side injects the live URL + secret from .local before copying to X:.
